zh.lifeSummary: 當Johan Peter Becker於1671年11月5日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆時，他的父親Hanss Peter Becker26歲，母親Anna Geraitt24歲。他於1697年1月15日與Anna Petronella Wendel在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1748年6月10日在他的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johan Peter Becker于1671年11月5日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆时，他的父亲Hanss Peter Becker26岁，母亲Anna Geraitt24岁。他于1697年1月15日与Anna Petronella Wendel在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1748年6月10日在他的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Becker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch: occupational name for a baker of bread, or brick and tiles, derived from Middle High German and Middle Dutch backen ‘to bake’. The German surname is also found in France (mainly Lorraine and Alsace).
Danish: occupational name for a baker, from bechere ‘baker’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a baker, from German Bäcker (compare 1 and Backer ) or Yiddish beker ‘baker’.

variants.name: Backer
meanings: German (Bäcker): variant of Becker . Compare Baecker .
Dutch: variant of   Bakker  . Compare   De Backer  .
Danish: probably of German origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Beckers
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ewald, Gerda, Hans, Klaus, Kurt, Wendelin, Wilhelmina.  French Jacques, Thierry.
Dutch, Flemish, and German: variant of Becker + the genitive case -s.

variants.name: Baecker
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegfried, Bodo, Gerhardt, Heinz, Horst, Kurt, Waltraud.
German (mainly Bäcker): variant of Becker . Compare Backer .

variants.name: Beck
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from northern Middle English bekke ‘stream’ (Old Norse bekkr).

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in northern France named Bec, for example Bec Hellouin in Eure, named with Old Norman French bec ‘stream’, from the same Old Norse root as in 1 above.
English: from the Middle English personal name Becke (Old English Becca or Beocca), of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Beckerle
meanings: South German: diminutive of   Becker  .

variants.name: De Beck
meanings: Flemish: short form of De Becker, see Becker , or a variant of Beckman .

variants.name: Beckermann
meanings: German: variant of Becker ‘baker’, formed with Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Johan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jens
meanings: Mainly Danish: variant of   Johan .

variants.name: Jöns
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Johan Peter Becker was born on 5 November 1671, in Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Hanss Peter Becker, was 26 and his mother, Anna Geraitt, was 24. He married Anna Petronella Wendel on 15 January 1697, in Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 10 June 1748, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johan Peter Becker est né le 5 novembre 1671, à Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Hanss Peter Becker, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anna Geraitt, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anna Petronella Wendel le 15 janvier 1697, à Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 juin 1748, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johan Peter Becker am 5. November 1671 in Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hanss Peter Becker 26 und seine Mutter Anna Geraitt 24. Er hat am 15. Januar 1697 in Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Anna Petronella Wendel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Juni 1748 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johan Peter Becker è nato il il 5 novembre 1671 nel Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Hanss Peter Becker, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anna Geraitt, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Anna Petronella Wendel il 15 gennaio 1697, nel Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 giugno 1748, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johan Peter Beckerが1671年11月5日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイムで生まれた時，父Hanss Peter Beckerは26歳，母Anna Geraittは24歳であった。1697年1月15日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイムでAnna Petronella Wendelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1748年6月10日に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.Of Geinsheim, Strknb, H-Dr: 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 그로ss-저오 그인셰임

ko.lifeSummary: Johan Peter Becker(이)가 1671년 11월 5일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 프레이머셰임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hanss Peter Becker(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Geraitt(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1697년 1월 15일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 프레이머셰임에서 Anna Petronella Wendel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1748년 6월 10일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johan Peter Becker nasceu em 5 de novembro de 1671, em Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Hanss Peter Becker, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anna Geraitt, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Petronella Wendel em 15 de janeiro de 1697, em Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de junho de 1748, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johan Peter Becker родился 5 ноября 1671 г. в местности фрамиршим, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Hanss Peter Becker было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Geraitt, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Petronella Wendel 15 января 1697 г. в местности фрамиршим, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 июня 1748 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johan Peter Becker nació el 5 de noviembre de 1671, en Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Hanss Peter Becker, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anna Geraitt, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anna Petronella Wendel el 15 de enero de 1697, en Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de junio de 1748, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
